epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Ankle-brachial index <0.90; confirm with duplex ultrasound or imaging

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: risk-based ABI screening in high-risk patients
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with structured vascular care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ABI and vascular imaging widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Antiplatelets, statins, supervised exercise, and revascularization when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High burden in smokers and socioeconomic disparities
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Comprehensive ESC/ESVS guidelines and broad access to vascular services
